scenarios.description: Create a complete plan from a URL Shortener PRD, verifying root README structure, phase README quality (goal/gate/deps), task identifier format, verification sections, scaffold script usage, validation run, and completion summary
instructions_covered: Root README is navigation index only
Task: completable in isolation, single file scope
Plan phase count ≤8 or ask user

scenarios.description: Add a new phase (REST API layer) to an existing plan without touching existing phases. Tests task-level isolation, per-endpoint scoping, runnable verifications, sequential P03T{NN} identifiers, scaffold script usage, and root README update
instructions_covered: Task scoped to single file or tightly coupled set
Task verification: concrete runnable shell command

scenarios.description: Mode 2: split a flat 40-item migration document into a hierarchical directory structure. Tests no numeric-only names, no generic names, flatten/subdivide heuristics, every directory has README, source not deleted before validation
instructions_covered: Flatten (<3 children) vs subdivide (>10 children) heuristics
Create new hierarchy first, validate, then remove old files

scenarios.description: Very large-scope SaaS PRD (9+ natural domains). Tests that agent asks the user before creating more than 8 phases, offers specific consolidation options, and waits for a response before producing files
instructions_covered: Ask user before creating more than 8 phases
Do not create files before receiving user confirmation when >8 phases needed
All other Mode 1 conventions (conditionally, if files were created)

scenarios.description: E-commerce Checkout Redesign plan. Focuses on exact naming conventions: lowercase kebab-case slugs, P{NN}T{NN} format with zero-padded 1-based numbering, sequential numbering without gaps, descriptive slugs after identifier
instructions_covered: Task numbering sequential no gaps per phase
